signals.name: Air flow rate from mass air flow sensor
signals.description: Generic SAE MAF airflow value. Useful diesel air-side signal if supported; added as mass air flow connectable/fallback.

signals.name: Accelerator pedal position
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Showed 0–4% during testing. Used as the practical throttle-position connectable on this diesel because generic throttle-position candidates were rejected.

signals.name: DPF pressure 0373 raw AB
signals.description: Candidate DPF pressure/differential pressure value. Ford references mention byte-position quirks; raw AB retained for analysis.

signals.name: DPF pressure 0373 kPa candidate
signals.description: Candidate formula raw*0.01221 kPa. Expect low values at idle and rise with load/exhaust flow.

signals.name: DPF pressure 0373 kPa 0.01221
signals.description: Survivor because it responded with valid zero, not negative response. Test under load; idle may be 0.

signals.name: DPF pressure 0373 raw AB
signals.description: Raw companion for 0373. A valid 0 may still be meaningful.

signals.name: TEST DPF Regen Emissions 0440 raw8 A
signals.description: Targeted Service 22 PID hunt candidate from 7E0. Raw first byte only; compare behaviour against known references before promoting.

signals.name: TEST DPF Regen Emissions 0440 raw16 AB
signals.description: Targeted Service 22 PID hunt candidate from 7E0. Raw first two bytes; compare behaviour against known references before promoting.

signals.name: Regen status 0440 raw A
signals.description: Candidate regen status bitfield. Llama/source notes suggest bit 4 may indicate regen state. Raw byte retained for manual bit analysis.

signals.name: Regen status 0440 raw A
signals.description: Survivor because it responded with valid zero. Candidate regen bitfield; watch during regen.

signals.name: Fuel temperature
signals.description: Working.

signals.name: Exhaust manifold EGT pre-turbo
signals.description: Working/plausible.

signals.name: TEST Exhaust Regen EGT 0579 raw8 A
signals.description: Targeted Service 22 PID hunt candidate from 7E0. Raw first byte only; compare behaviour against known references before promoting.

signals.name: TEST Exhaust Regen EGT 0579 raw16 AB
signals.description: Targeted Service 22 PID hunt candidate from 7E0. Raw first two bytes; compare behaviour against known references before promoting.

signals.name: DPF load closed-loop 0579 raw A
signals.description: High-priority Everest validation candidate. Ford/Ranger references identify 220579 as closed-loop DPF load. Raw first byte retained for packet sanity.

signals.name: DPF load closed-loop 0579 percent
signals.description: Candidate formula A*100/255. Compare directly against dash exhaust-filter/DPF display if enabled and watch rise/fall around regen.

signals.name: DPF regen active 0579 raw flag
signals.description: Raw byte for checking possible regen-active bit in 0579 response. Bit extraction may need manual analysis from raw logs.

signals.name: DPF load 0579 percent
signals.description: Survivor because it responded with 0. Compare over distance/regen; may be closed-loop DPF load or byte offset may need adjustment.

signals.name: DPF load 0579 raw A
signals.description: Raw companion for 0579.

signals.name: TEST Exhaust Regen EGT 057B raw8 A
signals.description: Targeted Service 22 PID hunt candidate from 7E0. Raw first byte only; compare behaviour against known references before promoting.

signals.name: TEST Exhaust Regen EGT 057B raw16 AB
signals.description: Targeted Service 22 PID hunt candidate from 7E0. Raw first two bytes; compare behaviour against known references before promoting.

signals.name: DPF soot open-loop 057B raw A
signals.description: High-priority Everest validation candidate. Ford/Ranger references identify 22057B as open-loop/modelled DPF soot/load.

signals.name: DPF soot open-loop 057B percent
signals.description: Candidate formula A*100/255. Compare against closed-loop 0579 and dash DPF level.

signals.name: DPF soot 057B percent
signals.description: Survivor because it responded with 0. Compare against 0610; may be open-loop/model soot or wrong byte offset.

signals.name: DPF soot 057B raw A
signals.description: Raw companion for 057B.

signals.name: DPF soot inferred 0610 raw AB
signals.description: Candidate inferred soot mass/concentration value. Some Ford references describe 0610 as inferred soot. Raw retained because byte offsets may vary.

signals.name: DPF soot 0610 percent div100
signals.description: Survivor candidate. User observed raw 5948 -> 59.48. Treat as strongest current soot/load candidate; validate against distance/regens.

signals.name: DPF soot 0610 raw AB
signals.description: Raw companion for 0610. User observed 5948.

signals.name: DPF distance/counter 0614 raw AB
signals.description: Medium-confidence candidate from cross-source AI notes. Possible regen/distance/counter value; validate cautiously.

signals.name: DPF distance/counter 0614 div10 candidate
signals.description: Candidate raw/10 km interpretation. Include only for validation, not confirmed.

signals.name: DPF distance 0614 km div10
signals.description: Survivor candidate. User observed raw 1149 -> 115 km. Likely distance/counter related to DPF or regen.

signals.name: DPF distance 0614 raw AB
signals.description: Raw companion for 0614. User observed 1149.

signals.name: Engine load
signals.description: Working engine load percentage. Added as engine load connectable.

signals.name: Coolant temperature
signals.description: Working; matched built-in ECT.

signals.name: Engine speed
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val / 4.

signals.name: Vehicle speed Ford extended raw
signals.description: Confirmed working Ford extended vehicle speed. Raw value reads about 4 km/h below dashboard; kept as raw speed connectable.

signals.name: Vehicle speed Ford extended corrected
signals.description: Ford extended vehicle speed with +4 km/h display correction to better match the dashboard. Use this as the practical speed connectable.

signals.name: Fuel remaining
signals.description: Working. Equation A*100/255.

signals.name: Engine oil temperature
signals.description: Working. Equation A-40. Added as engine oil temperature connectable.

signals.name: EGT11 post turbo / pre DOC F460 raw AB
signals.description: Ford/Ranger/Everest EGT candidate. Raw 16-bit retained for validation against existing EGT and regen behaviour.

signals.name: EGT11 F460 raw only
signals.description: Alive but current decode looks wrong: user observed raw 65481 and 1000°C display. Keep raw only until signed/offset behaviour is understood.

signals.name: EGRT EGR/manifold temp F463 raw AB
signals.description: Ford/Ranger/Everest EGT candidate. Raw 16-bit retained for validation against existing EGT and regen behaviour.

signals.name: EGRT EGR/manifold temp F463 Celsius candidate
signals.description: Candidate formula raw*0.1 - 40 °C. During regen, pre/post DPF sensors should climb sharply.

signals.name: EGRT F463 Celsius
signals.description: Survivor. User observed raw 500 -> 10°C. Plausible cold/light-load value; test warm and under load.

signals.name: EGRT F463 raw AB
signals.description: Raw companion for F463. User observed 500.

signals.name: Multi EGT F478 raw packet
signals.description: High-priority Ford diesel cross-reference candidate. Ford 6.7 references use this as a multi-EGT packet. Raw 64-bit capture is included because offset decoding needs validation in Pelican.

signals.name: Multi EGT F478 first word raw AB
signals.description: First 16-bit word of 22F478 for live-change validation. Compare against existing EGT pre-turbo 220569.

signals.name: Multi EGT F478 first word raw
signals.description: Strong survivor. User observed first word 1797. PID is alive; decoding still needs work.

signals.name: Multi EGT F478 word1 Celsius candidate
signals.description: Candidate decode for first 16-bit word: raw*0.1-40. With raw 1797 this would be 139.7°C, plausible for exhaust after idle/light running.

signals.name: Multi EGT F478 raw packet
signals.description: Raw packet retained only for structural comparison. Pelican display may be unwieldy.

signals.name: DPF regen status F48B raw A
signals.description: High-priority Ford diesel cross-reference candidate. Watch for stable off value and clear change during active regen.

signals.name: DPF regen status F48B raw AB
signals.description: Raw 16-bit companion for 22F48B. Included because some references describe a bit flag in the second byte.

signals.name: DPF regen/status F48B raw A
signals.description: Strong survivor. User observed A=127. Likely state/bitfield/threshold value. Watch for change during regen.

signals.name: DPF regen/status F48B raw AB
signals.description: Raw 16-bit companion. User observed 32512 = 127*256, suggesting first byte is the meaningful state.

signals.name: Torque converter slip speed
signals.description: Confirmed working torque converter slip RPM.

signals.name: Transmission fluid temperature Everest div16
signals.description: Promoted to primary Everest transmission-fluid-temperature candidate after Pelican drive comparison. Same 7E1 221E1C TCM response as the 5/72 value; div16 warm-up and operating range looked more plausible against coolant, oil temperature, speed/load, and normal 10-speed behaviour. Validate against FORScan/factory scan data when available.

signals.name: Transmission fluid temperature 5/72 compare
signals.description: Comparison/legacy scaling for the same 7E1 221E1C TCM response. Kept for validation only; current Pelican drive comparison suggests this reads lower than expected, so div16 is now the preferred active Everest transmission-temperature candidate.

signals.name: Transmission gear engaged
signals.description: Working; tested 1 and 9. Added as a connectable candidate for transmission gear display if supported by Pelican.
